name: TagInput
title: 标签输入框
description: 支持输入、添加、删除多个标签的输入组件，可配置数量限制、分隔符、拖拽排序等功能
author: RidgeUI

properties.name: value
properties.description: 当前标签列表，配合onChange实现双向绑定
properties.label: 标签值

properties.name: defaultValue
properties.description: 初始默认标签列表
properties.label: 默认标签

properties.name: inputValue
properties.description: 输入框实时内容
properties.label: 输入框内容

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: 输入框占位提示文字
properties.label: 提示文字
properties.defaultValue: 请输入并按回车添加标签

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: 是否禁用组件，禁用后无法编辑
properties.label: 禁用

properties.name: draggable
properties.description: 标签是否支持拖拽排序
properties.label: 可拖拽

properties.name: allowDuplicates
properties.description: 是否允许添加重复标签
properties.label: 允许重复

properties.name: addOnBlur
properties.description: 失去焦点时自动将输入内容转为标签
properties.label: 失焦添加

properties.name: showClear
properties.description: 是否显示清空所有标签按钮
properties.label: 显示清空

properties.name: autoFocus
properties.description: 是否自动获取焦点
properties.label: 自动聚焦

properties.name: separator
properties.description: 标签分隔符，默认逗号
properties.label: 分隔符

properties.name: max
properties.description: 最大允许添加的标签数量
properties.label: 最大标签数

properties.name: maxLength
properties.description: 单个标签的最大输入长度
properties.label: 标签最大长度

properties.name: maxTagCount
properties.description: 页面最多显示的标签数，超出显示+N
properties.label: 最大展示数

properties.name: expandRestTagsOnClick
properties.description: 点击组件时展开隐藏标签
properties.label: 点击展开标签

properties.name: showRestTagsPopover
properties.description: 悬停+N时显示全部标签
properties.label: 悬停显示全部

properties.name: showContentTooltip
properties.description: 标签过长时hover显示完整内容
properties.label: 显示完整提示

properties.name: size
properties.description: 输入框尺寸
properties.label: 尺寸

properties.name: validateStatus
properties.description: 校验状态样式
properties.label: 校验状态

properties.name: className
properties.description: 自定义CSS类名
properties.label: 自定义类名

properties.name: style
properties.description: 组件内联样式
properties.label: 内联样式

events.name: onChange
events.description: 标签列表发生变化时触发
events.label: 标签改变

events.name: onInputChange
events.description: 输入框内容变化时触发
events.label: 输入变化

events.name: onExceed
events.description: 标签数量超出上限时触发
events.label: 超出数量限制

events.name: onInputExceed
events.description: 单个标签长度超出上限时触发
events.label: 超出长度限制

events.name: onFocus
events.description: 输入框获得焦点时触发
events.label: 获取焦点

events.name: onBlur
events.description: 输入框失去焦点时触发
events.label: 失去焦点
